title: GoneCraft
description: A modpack centered around the Create mod with a few other content and QoL mods :D
body:
GoomCraft aims to improve upon the vanilla experience and also add new content for players to enjoy. Some of the major content mods included are:
- Create
- Ad Aster
- Applied Energistics 2
- Botania
- Hephaestus
- Farmer's Delight
- And More!

The pack was intended to be played on a server with a group of friends but also works as a standalone singleplayer modpack. If you intend to create a server with the pack you will have to remove some of the client-side mods to make the server run. In the future I may put together a proper server starter.
